name: LIPELLA PHARMACEUTICALS INC.
summary: pART i O verview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company that was incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware in February 2005. We are focused on developing new drugs by reformulating the active agents in existing generic drugs and optimizing these reformulations for new applications.
